ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the student belongs to */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the program */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary instructor for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "guide_url" TEXT /* URL to the experiment guide */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the experiment */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time to complete the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_experiments" (
  "student_experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student experiment entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "downloaded_guide" INTEGER /* Whether the student downloaded the experiment guide */,
  "experiment_result" TEXT /* Result of the experiment */,
  "experiment_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the experiment */,
  "report_submitted" INTEGER /* Whether the student submitted a report */,
  "question_asked" INTEGER /* Number of questions asked by the student */,
  "question_answered" INTEGER /* Number of questions answered by the instructor */,
  "quiz_result" TEXT /* Result of the quiz */,
  "quiz_time" REAL /* Time taken to complete the quiz */,
  "method_selected" INTEGER /* ID of the method selected by the student */,
  "substrate_selected" INTEGER /* ID of the substrate selected by the student */,
  "transponder_selected" INTEGER /* ID of the transponder selected by the student */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student started the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student completed the experiment */,
  "quiz_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student started the quiz */,
  "quiz_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student completed the quiz */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments from the instructor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_experiments_transponder_selected FOREIGN KEY ("transponder_selected") REFERENCES transponders ("transponder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_experiments_substrate_selected FOREIGN KEY ("substrate_selected") REFERENCES substrates ("substrate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_experiments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_experiments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_experiments_method_selected FOREIGN KEY ("method_selected") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the method details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substrates" (
  "substrate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substrate */,
  "substrate_name" TEXT /* Name of the substrate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the substrate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the substrate was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the substrate details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substrate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transponders" (
  "transponder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transponder */,
  "transponder_name" TEXT /* Name of the transponder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transponder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transponder was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the transponder details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transponder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "student_experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student experiment */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question asked by the student */,
  "asked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was asked */,
  "answered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was answered */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer provided by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_student_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_experiment_id") REFERENCES student_experiments ("student_experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the class details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)
